structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow Setpoint in Cooling State
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: 5.9.5.1 When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature is above room temperature, the setpoint is capped at the minimum endpoint. The heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to primary airflow setpoint between min and cooling max endpoints; if SAT > room temp, limit to min endpoint; heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The cooling -loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint  from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint.
If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint  shall be no higher than the minimum  endpoint.
Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Control in Heating State
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Primary airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. Discharge temperature is reset by the heating loop from the current AHU SAT to a maximum of MaxΔT above the space temperature setpoint. The heating coil modulates to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set primary airflow to minimum; reset DAT from AHU SAT up to MaxΔT above heating setpoint; modulate heating coil to maintain DAT setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
The heating -loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint  to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, generate Level 4 alarm. If < 50% for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0, Level 3 alarm. Alarms suppressed if Importance-Multiplier is 0 for static pressure reset T&R.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate alarm as specified; suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 min (Level 4); < 50% for 10 min (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  for 10 minutes while setpoint  is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its static pressure reset T&R  control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Discharge Air Temperature Alarms
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If heating hot-water plant is proven ON, and DAT is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint for 10 minutes, generate Level 4 alarm. If 17°C (30°F) less for 10 minutes, Level 3. Suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0 for hot-water reset T&R.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate alarm as specified; suppress if Importance-Multiplier is 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DAT less than setpoint by 8.3°C for 10 min (Level 4) or by 17°C for 10 min (Level 3)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 8.3°C (15°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 4 alarm.
If heating hot -water plant is proven ON, and the DAT  is 17°C (30°F) less than setpoint  for 10 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
If a zone has an Importance -Multiplier  of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1 ) for its hot-water  reset T&R  control loop, low -DAT  alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Series Fan Terminal Unit
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force: zone airflow to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin; damper full closed/open; heating ON/closed; fan ON/OFF; and reset request-hours accumulator. Overrides interlock at zone-group level per Section 5.4.5.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide overrides for airflow setpoints, damper, heating, fan, and reset accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  damper full closed/open ,
e. force  heating to ON/closed ,
f. turn fan ON/OFF, and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).
... Each of the following points is interlocked so that they can be overridden together at a zone -group level, per Section 5.4.5 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests from Series Fan Terminal Units
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series Fan-Powered Terminal Unit − Constant-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression, send 3 requests. Else if exceeds by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes after suppression, send 2 requests. Else if cooling loop > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%. Else if < 95%, send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send the specified number of requests based on conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule
